# Contract — `_manifest.yaml` schema (v2)

**Status**: Frozen for Spec 040 / branch 045. Subsequent breaking changes MUST bump `version`.

## File location

`<source.doc_index_dir>/_manifest.yaml` — default `docs/_index/_manifest.yaml`.

## Encoding

UTF-8 without BOM. Unix line endings (`\n`) on write; reader accepts both.

## Top-level shape

```yaml
# Auto-generated by `spectra docs index`. Do not edit by hand.
version: 2
generated_at: 2026-04-29T15:00:00Z
total_documents: 541
total_words: 158516
total_tokens_estimated: 205825
groups:
  - id: SM_GSG_Topics
    title: Store Manager Getting Started
    path: docs/requirements/gitbook-repo/docs/SM_GSG_Topics
    document_count: 145
    tokens_estimated: 10877
    skip_analysis: false
    excluded_by: none
    index_file: groups/SM_GSG_Topics.index.md
  - id: RD_Topics_Old
    title: Release Documentation (Archive)
    path: docs/requirements/gitbook-repo/docs/RD_Topics/Old
    document_count: 30
    tokens_estimated: 3200
    skip_analysis: true
    excluded_by: pattern
    excluded_pattern: "**/Old/**"
    index_file: groups/RD_Topics_Old.index.md
  - id: SM_GSG_Topics_Spillover
    title: Store Manager Getting Started (Spilled)
    path: docs/requirements/gitbook-repo/docs/SM_GSG_Topics
    document_count: 145
    tokens_estimated: 95234
    skip_analysis: false
    excluded_by: none
    index_file: groups/SM_GSG_Topics.index.md
    spillover_files:
      - docs/requirements/gitbook-repo/docs/SM_GSG_Topics/manage-items/standard-items/setting-up-standard-items.md
      - docs/requirements/gitbook-repo/docs/SM_GSG_Topics/manage-items/serialized-items/setting-up-serialized-items.md
```

## Field rules

### Top-level

- `version` (int, required) — must be `2` for this layout.
- `generated_at` (RFC3339 string, required) — UTC, second precision.
- `total_documents`, `total_words`, `total_tokens_estimated` (int, required) — non-negative.
- `groups` (sequence, required) — sorted by `id` (ordinal). May be empty.

### Per group

- `id` (string, required) — matches `^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$`. Must not start with `.` or `-`.
- `title` (string, required) — human-readable label. May be empty for `_root`.
- `path` (string, required) — repo-relative, forward slashes only.
- `document_count` (int, required) — non-negative.
- `tokens_estimated` (int, required) — non-negative.
- `skip_analysis` (bool, required).
- `excluded_by` (string, required) — one of `pattern`, `config`, `frontmatter`, `none`.
- `excluded_pattern` (string, optional) — present iff `excluded_by == pattern`.
- `index_file` (string, required) — relative to `_index/`. Must start with `groups/` and end with `.index.md`.
- `spillover_files` (sequence, optional) — present only when the suite triggered spillover (Phase 3+). Each entry is a repo-relative source-document path.

## Reader behavior

Readers:
- MUST reject `version != 2` with a clear error.
- MUST reject duplicate `id` values across groups.
- MUST reject `excluded_pattern` present without `excluded_by == pattern`.
- MUST normalize backslashes in stored paths to forward slashes (defensive).

## Writer behavior

Writers:
- MUST write to a temporary file (`_manifest.yaml.tmp`) then atomically rename.
- MUST sort groups by `id` (ordinal).
- MUST write a fixed leading comment `# Auto-generated by spectra docs index. Do not edit by hand.`
- MUST emit `null` and absent fields consistently — `excluded_pattern` and `spillover_files` are omitted when not applicable rather than emitted as `null`.

## Invariants

- `total_documents == sum(group.document_count for group in groups)`.
- For every `group.index_file`, the file exists at `<doc_index_dir>/<index_file>`.
- For every entry in `_checksums.json`, there exists exactly one suite that references that document.
